product_name: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild: Mipha (Standard edition)

bullets: Officially licensed Zelda: Breath of the Wild collectible statue — Mipha, Standard Edition
Mipha in a gentle pose with hand pressed to her chest, wielding the Lightscale Trident
Base features the Sheikah Eye symbol from the Sheikah Slate interface
Inspired by Mipha's official artwork from Breath of the Wild
content.description: The highly detailed Mipha PVC statue is inspired by her official artwork from The Legend of Zelda : Breath of the Wild. Mipha stands in a gentle pose with her hand gently pressed upon her chest; her other hand wielding the Lightscale Trident. The design on the base is based on the Sheikah tribe's eye symbol that appears when activating the Sheikah Slate interface.

attributes.whats_in_box:
• The Legend of Zelda : Breath of the Wild - Mipha PVC painted statue
• Highly detailed base inspired by The Legend of Zelda : Breath of the Wild art style
• F4F Leaflet with 500 F4F reward points included
